productDisplayName: Puma Power Cat Hard Ground Football
description: 1. A football for soccer games on "Hard Grounds" in all weather conditions                                                                                                                                                2. puma's hi-tech perimeter balance technology  3. Airlock valve to keep the ball bouncy at 10-15 PSI, 0.8-1.0 bar 4. Comes in a catchy white, red, black coloured design with puma leaping cat symbol on it 5. A size 5 football with 19 cm diameter, it comes with a 1 year shape guaranteeAll you football fans out there, what are you waiting for? Lets see you smashing goals out on the field with this Puma Power Cat football.
